message:
fix: 10 correctness bugs — NULL join semantics, cache key offset, queryToSql ops, count fast path

Correctness:
- worker-do: hash join NULL=NULL violated SQL semantics — now skips nulls
- worker-do: DISTINCT used ?? "" instead of NULL_SENTINEL (null/empty conflation)
- master-do: partition grouping used "__null__" instead of NULL_SENTINEL
- query-do: queryKey() omitted offset — cache collision for pagination
- query-do: explain() incorrectly marked in/neq as non-pushable
- wasm-engine: queryToSql missing not_in/between/like/is_null/is_not_null ops
- wasm-engine: queryToSql missing OFFSET clause
- local-executor: count() fast path ignored filterGroups/aggregates/groupBy
- local-executor: queryCacheKey missing filterGroups/distinct fields
- client: fromOperator push(...batch) stack overflow on large batches

Performance:
- lance-v2: computePageStats Set<number> → bitwise Uint8Array lookup
- local-executor: diff() O(n²) Array.includes → O(1) Set.has
- footer: dataTypeFromEnum hoisted static map (no per-call allocation)
